name: Operator Tools
description: Installs the repo operator toolchain: Terraform, Dagger, Mutagen, gcloud, jq, and SSH client utilities.

terraformVersion.description: Terraform CLI version to install from releases.hashicorp.com.

daggerVersion.description: Dagger CLI version to install with the official installer.

mutagenVersion.description: Mutagen CLI version to install from GitHub releases.

installGcloud.description: Install the Google Cloud CLI from the official apt repository.
